claim: First-of-its-kind quantum-hardened agentic AI governance infrastructure

library.name: @noble/post-quantum

declaration: CoreIdentity is the first Agentic AI Governance Infrastructure to implement NIST FIPS 203/204/205 compliant cryptography across the complete governance enforcement chain — from agent request validation to archival audit record — with 100000 empirically documented quantum-secured governance interactions.
